case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. TENESHA N FIELDS

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-16-2024 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-22-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER COURT TRIAL CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2024 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-16-2024 AT 10:15 AM IN DEPT. 606, JUDGE JOSEPH M. QUINN. GREGORY PARKS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TENESHA FIELDS APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. PARTIES DID NOT SETTLE IN THE HALLWAY. TRIAL TIME ESTIMATE: 30 MINUTES. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
COURT TRIAL ON SEP-16-2024 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON SEP-16-2024 BY JOSEPH M. QUINN. JUDGE: HONORABLE JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: C. CHENG; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; BAILIFF: NOT ASSIGNED. (606)
COURT TRIAL ON SEP-16-2024 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. ENDORSED FILED COPY OF JUDGMENT IS PROVIDED TO ALL PARTIES IN COURT. PARTIES WAVIE ADDITIONAL SERVICE.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210050884) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. SERVED OCT-14-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIELDS, TENESHA N

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIELDS, TENESHA N $7,866.74 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,866.74, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT.
